title: Luxuriously Optimized
description: Running 20 fps on a potato pc? Well dont worry, this modpack has all you need to multiply your fps by 10 times! Why buy a 2000$ pc if you can just get a modpack!
body: This is a modpack that works to enhance your game experience, mostly performance. It aimes to giving you an optifine experience, but even better by using a mix of mods such as performance mods, mods that give more settings options, and more.
